steps.title: Locate the requested group
steps.content: The horizontal axis lists groups $1$ through $10$. The question asks for group $6$, so use the bar above $6$.

steps.title: Read the bar height
steps.content: The bar for group $6$ reaches the $40$ mark on the vertical axis. Since the vertical axis measures cans collected, group $6$ collected $40$ cans. The answer is 40.
